generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "The permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearTransmissionActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "The gear transmission component transmitting power from the motor to the cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "The cycloidal gearbox providing high reduction ratio and structural flexibility for the robot axis"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor measuring motor angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring gearbox output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded temperature sensor measuring operational temperature of the gearbox assembly"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OperationalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance OperationalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque values (motor torque, gear torque, output torque) computed from sensor inputs and manufacturer dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted, GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity measurements from sensor inputs and dynamics models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted, GearboxAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model implementing Stribeck friction characteristics for high-speed applications"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model implementing Dahl friction characteristics for complex gearbox dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box analytical friction model implementing LuGre friction characteristics for dynamic compensation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxDataDrivenModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box data-driven friction model trained from real-time sensor data for adaptive compensation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SystemBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing the structural model of the first vertical axis (motor, gear transmission, cycloidal gearbox)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SystemIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram detailing the internal behavior and interactions of the first vertical axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic framework for linking physical and virtual models using Asset Administration Shell standards"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelSimulation : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-affected outputs comparing ideal vs. real-time friction-compensated behavior"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live sensor data streams (motor current, torque, angular velocity) transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleDataTransmitted, GearboxAngleDataTransmitted, OperationalTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEngineeringEnabler
]

instance ModelDeviationAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived data representing model deviations between simulated and real-time measurements for predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionModelSimulation, RealTimeSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulinkEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MathWorksSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink platform for executing friction models and behavioral simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, BlackBoxDataDrivenModel, FrictionModelSimulation
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tools for structural modeling (BDD/IBD) of the robot axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemBDD, SystemIBD
]

instance MQTTEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol implementation for real-time sensor data streaming from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSensorData
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell framework for semantic integration of physical and virtual models"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive dashboard for visualizing aggregated data traces (motor current, torque, angular velocity) and model comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification and refinement of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight, ModelRefinementAction
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of friction models to minimize motion inaccuracies (up to 30%) during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCompensationAction
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Early detection of wear or load-induced changes via model deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides WearDetectionInsight
]

instance DynamicCompensationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameters for dynamic friction compensation in control algorithms (adaptive control loops)"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAction
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregated data visualization comparing measured vs. simulated outputs and detecting friction deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components using Coulomb-Viscous models"
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous model updates via real-time data feedback to adapt to operational changes (wear, load, temperature)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionCompensationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of friction models to minimize up to 30% motion inaccuracies during operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WearDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Early detection of wear or load-induced changes via model deviations between simulated and real-time measurements"
]

instance ControlParameterAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameters for dynamic friction compensation in adaptive control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated data visualization comparing measured vs. simulated outputs to detect friction deviations"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (low-latency) with live data acquisition**:
  - **Data sampling rate**: Not explicitly stated, but inferred to be **high-frequency** (e.g., kilohertz-level) for sensor streams (motor current, angle) to capture dynamic friction effects.
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are processed in **near-real-time** to enable **continuous friction model updates** during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - **Centralized digital shadow** for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, incorporating:
    - **Live sensor data** (motor/gearbox encoders, CNC controller).
    - **Simulation models** (Simulink) for friction analysis.
    - **Dashboard visualization** for real-time comparison of measured vs. simulated data.
  - **No decentralized twins** are mentioned; the focus is on a **single-axis digital shadow** as a foundational baseline for broader digital twin development."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across the following life-cycle stages:
  - **As designed**: Structural models (SysML Block Definition Diagram) define the robot’s first axis architecture.
  - **As manufactured**: Live sensor data and dynamics models (e.g., motor/gearbox parameters) are integrated to simulate ideal vs. friction-affected behavior.
  - **As operated**: Continuous refinement of friction models during operation to adapt to wear, load, or environmental changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - **Sensor calibration**: Motor/gearbox encoders reduce backlash and positional uncertainty via encoder difference analysis.
    - **Model validation**: Simulation models (e.g., Simulink) are compared against measured data to validate friction models.
  - **Uncertainty management**:
    - **Parameter identification**: Manufacturer-provided dynamics models account for system-specific parameters (e.g., gear ratios, motor constants).
    - **Error mitigation**: Real-time friction model refinement reduces cumulative errors from wear or load variations.
  - **Traceability**: Metadata links data traces to their sources (e.g., MQTT channels, SysML models) for auditable validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) are established via:
  - **MQTT protocol**: Real-time bidirectional data exchange for sensor streams (motor current, angle) and derived metrics (torque, velocity).
  - **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller**: Acts as the intermediary for sensor data acquisition and dynamics model computation.
  - **SysML/AAS integration**: Semantic linking of physical components (e.g., motor, gearbox) to virtual models for traceability."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed as a **localized, real-time system**:
  - **Hosting**: Integrated within the robot’s control infrastructure (SINUMERIK 840D CNC) or a dedicated cloud-based dashboard for visualization.
  - **Technology stack**:
    - **Simulation**: MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for model execution.
    - **Dashboard**: Custom-built visualization tool for data aggregation and comparison (e.g., measured vs. simulated outputs).
    - **Data processing**: MQTT-based pipelines for live data ingestion."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **SysML (System Modeling Language)**: For structural modeling of the robot’s first axis.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: For semantic integration of physical and virtual components.
  - **MQTT protocol**: For real-time data exchange (standardized for IoT/CPS applications).
  - **MathWorks Simulink**: Industry-standard simulation toolkit for model-based systems engineering."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety cell restrictions**: The robot’s working range is limited to **[-90°, 90°]** to prevent collisions.
  - **Passive data flow**: Digital shadow operates as a one-way data flow (no virtual-to-physical interaction), ensuring no direct control over the robot.
  - **Operational safety**: Live data analysis enables proactive friction mitigation without remote execution risks."
]
